package rulecoverage

func NegativeMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTests() string {
    ruleID := "mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_tests"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Many copy-pasted mock repository structs with the same method sets."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
